Why source through Redmac

One partner, the whole Moroccan pantry.

Redmac Consulting consolidates leading Moroccan brands and producers into a single, reliable export channel — with the paperwork, packaging and logistics handled for you.

Halal & certified

Halal-compliant sourcing with health certificates, certificates of origin and full export documentation.

Container-load logistics

FCL & LCL shipping from Casablanca and Tanger-Med, with mixed containers across categories.

Private label

Custom recipes, sizes, languages and artwork — your own brand, produced to spec in Morocco.

Global reach

Export experience across the Gulf, West Africa, Europe and North America — tuned to local market needs.

The catalogue · September 2025

Explore 33 export-ready categories.

Filter by family or search by name. Tap any product for varieties, brands and packaging — then request a quote for the lines you need.

How to order

From enquiry to delivery, in four steps.

Send your list

Share the categories, target sizes and destination market. We reply with availability and indicative pricing.

Quote & samples

You receive a formal FOB/CIF quotation, specs and — where needed — physical or photo samples.

Confirm & produce

We finalise packaging, private-label artwork and the proforma, then schedule production.

Ship & document

Loading, inspection and full export paperwork — your container leaves Morocco on time.

Get in touch

Let's build your Moroccan order.

Tell us what you're looking for and we'll come back within one business day with availability and pricing.
